item.description:
严重程度: Unknown
发布日期: Unknown
来源: Unknown
描述: 暂无详细描述
相关PoC:
maldev: Go offensive-security research library — 15+ injection methods, AMSI/ETW/ntdll-unhook evasion, sleep mask (Ekko × XOR/RC4/AES), call-stack spoof, BYOVD (RTCore64) + kernel callback removal, LSASS dump + pure-Go MSV1_0 parser w/ PPL bypass, recon (sandbox/VM/debugger/dllhijack), PE ops (sRDI/BOF/CLR), Meterpreter C2, UAC bypass, CVE-2024-30088 LPE.
